footer.description: Poorly developed with Next.js and Tailwind CSS.

home.description: My name is Henning Åsheim and I am a political scientist currently working as a research assistant at the University of Oslo. On a daily basis, I work with both research and teaching, and my strength lies in quantitative methods. I am also interested in programming and work a lot with collecting, processing and analysing data. In addition, I am interested in politics and what is happening both in the Norwegian society and in the world at large. This site is a presentation of me, as well as including a blog where I write about what interests me.
